name: Hollywall Entertainment, Inc.
summary: Hollywall Entertainment, Inc. offers digital music network and entertainment services. It also provides construction and development services, which include building houses, industrial parks, and commercial and retail buildings; and telecom services, such as maintenance of cable, network, and communications infrastructure. In addition, the company offers education services in career, technical, and high school education programs; and infrastructure services, including water and wastewater management, road and bridge inspections, and construction management services. Hollywall Entertainment, Inc. was incorporated in 2009 and is based in Washington, District of Columbia.
